article_title: Burnaby Council — 8.2. Attachment 1 - Draft Making Life Better PRC Plan 2026.03.10.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to Consider 25-Year Parks, Recreation and Culture Master Plan
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on 'Making Life Better,' a draft 25-year plan that would guide all City spending and decisions on parks, recreation facilities, and cultural programs in Burnaby through 2050, including new community centres, upgraded parks, and expanded arts programming.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council vote — this plan shapes future facility investments, park upgrades, and cultural programs near your business.
